acceptedAnswer.text: Taiwan Stock Radar is an open-source Taiwan equity analysis skill for AI agents, analysts, and developers. It combines market-wide scanning, Top 20 opportunity ranking, and structured single-stock deep-dive analysis.

mainEntity.name: How does Taiwan Stock Radar produce a Top 20 shortlist?

acceptedAnswer.text: The skill scans a broad Taiwan stock universe, interprets market regime, sector rotation, factor strength, and risk filters, then ranks candidates and surfaces the names most worthy of closer research attention.

mainEntity.name: Does a higher score guarantee upside?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. A higher score indicates stronger supporting conditions inside the framework. It is a research priority signal, not a guarantee of future returns.

mainEntity.name: How are buy, stop, and take-profit zones handled?

acceptedAnswer.text: Taiwan Stock Radar frames action zones rather than fixed promises. It describes a preferred buy area, an invalidation or stop area, and a take-profit or trim framework so the recommendation stays tied to risk management.

mainEntity.name: What happens when the user requests a single-stock analysis?

acceptedAnswer.text: The workflow expands into a deeper memo that includes thesis, peers, catalysts, context, scenario framing, and a more explicit action plan.
